generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. The data shows that countries with strong alliance commitments experience 40% fewer security threats. We can't afford to weaken our partnerships - it's our duty to maintain these bonds for long-term stability. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
